case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. MARIA ENRIQUETA SANCHEZ DIAZ

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. REPRESENTED BY MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST.. DEFENDANT MARIA ENRIQUETA SANCHEZ DIAZ DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $575.34 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DIAZ, MARIA ENRIQUETA SANCHEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-08-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED JAN-14-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DIAZ, MARIA ENRIQUETA SANCHEZ
